opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I slipped with the chef's knife, and it sliced right open; I can see the yellow fat inside and it won't stop bleeding!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Deep kitchen knife cut to the forearm with ongoing bleeding.

symptom_narrative.character: deep cut with gaping edges and continuous oozing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: firm pressure with a towel has slowed it somewhat
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: can see yellow fatty tissue in the wound, can still move all fingers and has normal feeling in the hand
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: sitting at the kitchen table holding a blood-soaked towel against the arm

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spouse present and assisting, last tetanus booster over a decade ago

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants to know if she needs stitches or can manage it herself
